ollama_url.name: Ollama URL
ollama_url.description: Base URL of your local Ollama instance (e.g. http://localhost:11434).

ollama_model.name: Ollama Model
ollama_model.description: Model name to use in Ollama (e.g. mistral, llama3).

anthropic_api_key.name: Anthropic API Key
anthropic_api_key.description: Optional. Used as fallback if Ollama fails. Leave empty to disable.

anthropic_model_fast.name: Anthropic Model
anthropic_model_fast.description: Anthropic model to use for YAML repair (e.g. claude-haiku-20240307).

repo_subdir.name: Repo Subdirectory
repo_subdir.description: Optional subdirectory inside /share/ai_dashboard_builder for git operations.

git_auto_commit.name: Git Auto-Commit
git_auto_commit.description: Commit generated files locally (no push). Requires /share/ai_dashboard_builder to be a git repo.
